hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""') && if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^(npm|npx|pnpm)\b'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"npm, npx, and pnpm are not allowed. Use bun/bunx instead. Examples: bun install, bun run <script>, bun add <pkg>, bunx <cmd>."}}'; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""') && if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git (commit|push).*--no-verify|git (commit|push).*-n\b'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Using --no-verify is not allowed. Git hooks must run to ensure code quality. Fix any issues reported by pre-commit hooks before committing."}}'; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""') && if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE 'DROP\s+(DATABASE|ROLE)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"DROP DATABASE/ROLE is not allowed. Use the setup script (scripts/db/setup-database.sh) which handles database recreation safely."}}'; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""') && if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE '(psql|mysql|sqlite3|mongosh).*(-c|-e|--command)' && echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE '\b(INSERT|UPDATE|DELETE|TRUNCATE|ALTER|CREATE)\b'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Direct SQL write statements are not allowed. Create a migration script or SQL file instead, then execute it manually or via a migration tool."}}'; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""') && if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE '(psql|mysql|sqlite3).*<.*\.sql|cat.*\.sql.*\|.*(psql|mysql|sqlite3)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Direct execution of SQL files is not allowed. Review the generated SQL script first, then execute it manually."}}'; fi

content=$(jq -r '.tool_input.content // .tool_input.new_string // ""') && file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""') && if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' && echo "$content" | grep -qiE 'AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|api[_-]?key\s*[:=]\s*["'\'']\''][a-zA-Z0-9_-]{20,}|-----BEGIN (RSA |EC )?PRIVATE KEY-----|mongodb(\+srv)?://[^:]+:[^@]+@|postgres(ql)?://[^:]+:[^@]+@'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Potential hardcoded secret detected. Use environment variables (process.env.VAR_NAME) instead of hardcoding API keys, tokens, or connection strings."}}'; fi
